metadata.description: Standalone marketplace for the EDPA plugin. Lets users do `/plugin marketplace add technomaton/edpa` and install the plugin without going through the technomaton-hub indirection. The hub also distributes the same plugin as `tm-edpa` — both paths land on identical payload (technomaton/edpa@plugin).

plugins.name: edpa
plugins.description: EDPA — Evidence-Driven Proportional Allocation. Derive hours from Git delivery evidence. Zero timesheets, Monte Carlo calibrated CW weights, bidirectional sync with GitHub Projects.
